title: Verify restructure against plan doc
description:
Final verification bead. After all phases are complete:
1. Read docs/package-restructure-design.md and verify every item was implemented as specified
2. Verify the root package is a single file (treesitter.go) with zero logic
3. Verify no internal package imports the root package
4. Verify import graph matches the target state in the design doc
5. Verify all duplicate packages (Stack, Lexer) are eliminated
6. Run full test suite: make test && make test-corpus
7. Verify make fuzz works
8. Document any deviations from the plan in a brief summary
